steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: the t0027 literature synthesis already curated the relevant corpus (Dan2018, Sivyer2013) and the task description explicitly instructs to skip this step.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: t0027 synthesis already covered internet-discovered morphology-DS papers and the task description explicitly instructs to skip this step.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Survey t0022 testbed code, t0012 scorer, t0026 sweep driver, and dsgc-baseline-morphology to plan distal-length modulation.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the distal-dendrite length sweep: branch-order classification, sweep multipliers, protocol, metrics.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local CPU only, no remote compute per task description.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement the sweep driver that varies distal-branch L, runs the 12-angle protocol per multiplier, and produces tuning data, DSI metrics, and charts.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Generate falsifiable alternative interpretations of the DSI-vs-length curve and flag third-mechanism (kinetic-tiling) possibilities.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare the DSI-vs-length curve against Dan2018 passive-TR and Sivyer2013 dendritic-spike predictions.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: File follow-up suggestions based on the discriminated mechanism and any surprising findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed.
